gotchas: **Gotcha — the atone Stop gate.** Its block message tells you to mute via `~/.claude/atone/.nudge-off`, but the code checks `~/.claude/atone/.gate-off`; and Condition 2 fires on a `.atone-add-failed` marker even when the same mistake was already recorded by a prior successful add. Resolved by clearing the false marker; filed `prop-20260629-142846-fd`.

**A fast model beat the strong ones.** `gemini-3.5-flash` tied or beat every OpenAI option including `gpt-5.5` on this closed-set pick, at lower cost. The real accuracy ceiling is the product data (14% of rows unsolvable by any model), not the model choice.
